archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Tokyo Speakeasy / Cyberpunk Variant)
concept: A hidden, underground speakeasy vibe with neon back-alley aesthetics. Ditching the generic corporate ecommerce look for a highly stylized, cinematic shopping experience.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
rules.weight_contrast: Radical weight contrast (Black vs Light). Never use generic regular weights for headings.

color_palette.rules: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF). Never use purple/white gradients. Rely on Black-on-Black layers to ground the neon. Use neon colors purely for interaction, glow, and borders.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24) on marketing/storefront pages to let the dark atmosphere breathe. Tight density (gap-4) for the Admin Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical 'Tetris' grid logic for the home page featured products (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2 for Hero).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px solid borders (border-pink-500/30 or border-zinc-800) heavily. Minimal border-radius (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).

buttons.primary: bg-cyber_yellow text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(253,224,71,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary_neon: bg-transparent border border-neon_pink text-neon_pink font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-neon_pink hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,16,122,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-3
buttons.whatsapp: bg-transparent border border-whatsapp_neon text-whatsapp_neon hover:bg-whatsapp_neon hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(37,211,102,0.6)] font-bold uppercase rounded-none px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-3

cards.product_card: bg-surface border border-zinc-800 hover:border-neon_pink/50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none p-4 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.hover_effect: On hover, the product image scales up slightly, and the card gets a subtle inner neon glow.

inputs.style: bg-black border-b border-zinc-700 focus:border-neon_pink focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-2 text-primary font-mono outline-none transition-colors

age_gate.content: Strict DOB picker (DD/MM/YYYY) using font-mono. 'ENTER THE UNDERGROUND' CTA in cyber_yellow.

hero_landing.background: Use image 'hero_neon_bar'. Overlay with bg-black/40 (gradient to bottom for seamless blending).
hero_landing.typography: Massive Unbounded text. 'NECTAR OF THE NIGHT.'
hero_landing.marquee: Use a slow-moving marquee at the bottom: '21+ ONLY // PREMIUM LIQUORS // KUALA LUMPUR DELIVERY'.

product_catalog.filters: Sidebar or top sticky bar. Categories (Whisky, Gin, Vodka) styled as clickable neon tags.
product_catalog.product_details: Image centered. Title in Unbounded. Price and ABV% in JetBrains Mono neon_pink. 'ADD TO CART' secondary_neon button.

cart_and_checkout.receipt_style: Order summary must look like a POS terminal printout (JetBrains Mono, dashed borders).
cart_and_checkout.checkout_action: Manual Bank Transfer instructions box (border-cyber_yellow border p-4). Then large WhatsApp CTA to finalize order.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Left sidebar for navigation.
admin_dashboard.data_display: JetBrains Mono for all tables. Use laser_green for positive stock, neon_pink for low stock alerts.

image_urls.description: Tokyo back-alley speakeasy entrance (Hero section background)
Abstract dark matte black texture with subtle neon pink/cyan edge lighting
Dark minimalist aesthetic background with glowing neon yellow circle light
Jack Daniels whiskey on black background
Red neon signage for bar details

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='age-gate-submit', data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-whatsapp-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure neon text against black background passes minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Text shadow can be used if overlaying on images.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Import Unbounded, Outfit, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
DO NOT use Shadcn Card components with their default soft border-radius. Override rounded-xl to rounded-none or rounded-sm. Embrace sharp edges.
Implement the age gate as a strictly enforced modal overlay on first visit using the age_gate_bg image.

For the checkout flow, do NOT build a standard credit card form. The user requires Manual Bank Transfer + WhatsApp handoff. Generate a WhatsApp API link containing the cart details and order total upon clicking the checkout button.
Build the admin dashboard separately (e.g., /admin route) with a dense data layout using JetBrains Mono for inventory metrics.
Rely heavily on Tailwind's shadow utilities customized with neon colors for hover states (e.g., hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_#FF107A]).
Ensure the hero image is layered correctly. Use bg-black/40 overlay to ensure Unbounded typography remains highly legible.
Apply data-testid attributes to everything for future automated testing.
